title: Plugin SDK redesign: events, manifest, capabilities, egui-share, proc-macro

notes: Added hachimi-plugin-macros proc-macro crate (#[hachimi_plugin]); added PluginManifest/PluginManifestFn/PluginEventFn + event & capability modules to abi; bumped API_VERSION 8→9, VTABLE_SLOT_COUNT 53→42; updated abi_layout test.

description: Redesign abi Vtable: remove widget slots, add subscribe/unsu
notes: Removed 15 gui_ui_* widget slots; added host_capabilities/host_subscribe/host_unsubscribe/gui_unregister; registration slots now return u64 handles.

description: SDK: egui re-export + ui_from_ptr, Sdk::on/capabilities, han
notes: SDK re-exports egui + #[hachimi_plugin]; added ui_from_ptr; Sdk::on/off, capabilities/has_capability, log_warn/log_error, register_* return handles, unregister. Removed per-widget wrappers.

description: Host api.rs: implement new slots; wire event dispatch at run
notes: Added core/plugin/events.rs (subscribe/dispatch); rewrote api.rs (new slots, removed widget impls); menu/overlay stores carry handles + remove_by_handle; mod.rs next_handle/unregister; dispatch wired at run_overlays(FRAME), reload_config(CONFIG_RELOAD), DllMain detach(SHUTDOWN); loader reads manifest.
training-tracker init now uses #[hachimi_plugin]; ui.rs draws with egui directly via ui_from_ptr (collapsing/checkbox/buttons/colored_label all native egui); register_* handle checks.
Workspace build + strict clippy (-D warnings) clean; fmt applied; tests pass (82 host + 3 abi-layout + 32 plugin). Updated docs/architecture.md with the v9 plugin model.
